title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Vestian

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Vestian
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Vestian in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vestian:
Vestian is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vestian!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
